title: Spicy Pungent Gouda Lasagna
description: A unique Thai-inspired lasagna with gouda cheese and a pungent twist.

ingredients.name: Greek yogurt
ingredients.notes: To be used as a topping

instructions: Cook the lasagna noodles according to package instructions.
In a pan, heat 1 tbsp of oil and sauté the pungent chili peppers.
Add the tasty sauce, Thai red curry paste, and 1 cup of water to the pan.
Bring the sauce to a simmer and let it cook for 5 minutes.
In a separate bowl, mix the gouda cheese and 1/2 cup of the sauce.
Spread a layer of the sauce in the bottom of a baking dish.
Arrange 4 lasagna noodles on top of the sauce.
Spread half of the gouda cheese mixture on top of the noodles.
Repeat the layers, ending with a layer of noodles and the remaining sauce.
Top with shredded cheese and bake for 25-30 minutes.
Let the lasagna rest for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve with Greek yogurt as a topping.
